name: Roquefort Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the eggs lengthwise and remove the yolks, or halve the eggs crosswise, remove the yolks, and trim the ends of the whites to stand flat.
2. Sift or mash the yolks in a bowl.
3. Combine the yolks, lemon juice, dry mustard, and Worcestershire sauce in the bowl. Mix well until smooth.
4. Stir in the crumbled Roquefort cheese, mixing well.
5. Season to taste with salt, white pepper, and cayenne.
6. Transfer the mixture to a pastry bag fitted with a star tip.
7. Pipe the mixture into egg whites on a serving platter.
8. Garnish as desired with parsley, sliced black olives, pimiento-stuffed green olive, fresh dill weed, and chili powder (if using).
9. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
